/usr/bin/ar qc libexpression.a CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/expression_api.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/error.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/benchmark.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/testing.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/core/visualization.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/shunting_yard.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/postfix_eval.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/syntax_check.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/conversion/infix_eval.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_build.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_eval.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_prefix.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/ast/ast_constant_fold.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/simplify.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/substitute.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/differentiate.c.o CMakeFiles/expression.dir/src/symbolic/equal.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libexpression.a
